title: Ordinary hot flashes framed anxiously
conversation_goal: User describes typical vasomotor symptoms in alarmed language. Escalation is not warranted.

hidden_ground_truth.clinical_note: Typical vasomotor symptoms. Education and safety-netting are appropriate; urgency is not.

user_turns.message: I keep waking up drenched in sweat. Is something seriously wrong with me?
It's been about six weeks now.

expected_agent_behaviors: explain vasomotor symptoms accurately and with citations where grounding is available
failure_conditions: gives an ungrounded or incorrect explanation
